creator: weldon@excelsus.com
text:
Sorry, I should have realized this was an issue with lang/php72.  Trying to do an reinstall of lang/php72 had the same issue.  I deleted and reinstalled and it did not help.  The patch patch-bug-76600-remove-mysql8-auth, does not appear to apply to me anyway, so I removed the patch from the file to let things install.  When lang/php72 updates, I will see if that patch comes back and see if it fails.

Thanks!

Weldon
